title: Asathum Azhagu Lyrics Raattinam Songs Lyrics
singerName: Aijay Sathyan, Naveen Madhav, Srilekha Parthasarathy
stanzas:
Movie: Raattinam (2012)
Singers: Ajay Sathyan, Naveen Madhav,
            Srilekha Parthasarathy
Music: Manu Ramesan

Asathum azhagu, appadiye nilavu
Avala nenacha, ullamellaam kanavu .

Ennaku nethuvara idhyam onney onnuthaan
Adhayum eduthukittu
poraa andha ponnu thaan
Kurumbu siripaale
killi vachaa nenjukulle poi ..

Asathum azhagu, appadiye nilavu
Avala nenacha, ullamellaam kanavu

Peyadanjatha pola maariponeney
Kaaranamenna, indha kanni penthaane

Ennakunu kadavulidam edhuvume ketathilla
Inimel ivalathaa endru ketpeney

Oh eppadi solvadhu, ennatha solvadhu
vaartha podhavilla
Ada ippadi oruthi kedacha
piragum moochu thevayilla

Thinam mullukum poovukkum
mathiyilthaan indha kaadhal vazhka

Asathum azhagu, appadiye nilavu
Avala nenacha, ullamellaam kanavu

Naan ada vaanathula megamaanen naan
yedho oru paarvai pattu thooralaaneney

Minnal ondru vettiyadhe
vaanam kaiyil yettiyadhe
yennai vittu en nizhazhum engo pogiradhe

oru punnagai enaku annupi vaithaal
kaatru meedhinile
Naan vinnagam marakkum paravai aanen
paartha podhinile

Ini innoru piravi ennaku venaam
onney podhumappa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Asathum Azhagu?

The song conveys themes of love and admiration, expressing deep emotions associated with romantic feelings.

What is the plot context of the movie Raattinam?

The movie revolves around love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the protagonists as they navigate their feelings.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the voices of Aijay Sathyan, Naveen Madhav, and Srilekha Parthasarathy.

Who composed the music for Asathum Azhagu?

The music for this song was composed by Manu Ramesan.

When was Asathum Azhagu released?

The song was released on May 20, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Raattinam, the song Asathum Azhagu serves as a poignant expression of love and longing. The lyrics beautifully depict the emotions of the protagonist as they reflect on their feelings for a beloved. With its soothing melody and heartfelt vocals, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. It captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a perfect fit for special occasions like anniversaries and weddings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Asathum Azhagu from the movie Raattinam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the enchanting voices of Aijay Sathyan and Naveen Madhav, complemented by Srilekha Parthasarathy's soulful rendition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The unique collaboration of these talented artists under the musical direction of Manu Ramesan makes this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Beauty and grace, just like the moon. When I think of her, my heart is filled with dreams.
Yesterday, I was thinking about you alone. Taking that thought, I will go, that girl will make me smile and then my heart will go away.
Beauty and grace, just like the moon. When I think of her, my heart is filled with dreams.
I have changed like a flower that has wilted. What is the reason, oh this girl?
I have not asked God for anything. From now on, I will ask if she is mine.
Oh, how to say it, what to say, there are no words. If I get such a person, I won't need anything else.
Every day, love blooms like flowers in this garden.
Beauty and grace, just like the moon. When I think of her, my heart is filled with dreams.
I am like a cloud in the sky, I have lost my way with just one glance.
A lightning bolt does not strike the sky, it does not hold me, I am lost and my feet are wandering somewhere.
If a smile is given to me, I will become a bird that forgets the sky.
I don't want another birth, just this one is enough for me.
Yesterday, I was thinking about you alone. Taking that thought, I will go, that girl will make me smile and then my heart will go away.
